---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false
toc: false
css: ../css/about.css
---

:::{.column-body-outset}


::: {layout="[[56,4,40]]"}

<div>

# Background

Hi <span>&#128075;</span> ! I am Mano Prakash Parthasarathi, a Ph.D. student in the department of Computer Science at North Carolina State University. My research interests lie broadly in Theoretical Computer Science, with primary interests in String and Graph algorithms.

<br>

I completed my Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science and Engineering at the Government College of Technology, Coimbatore, from 2015 to 2019. Following my undergraduate studies, I entered the industry as an Associate Software Engineer <span class="bi bi-laptop" style="color: #476fdc;"></span> at OptumInsight India Private Limited in Chennai, where I worked from June 2019 until November 2021.

<br>

Driven by my interest in Mathematics, I then wrote the Joint Admission for Masters (JAM) examination in 2022 and joined the M.Sc. Mathematics program at IIT Madras. It was during this time that I got exposed to different fields of Theoretical Computer Science (special mention to the Theory CS group at IIT Madras), which motivated me to pursue a Ph.D. in this field.

<br>

One of the things I enjoy the most about research is that no two days are the same ; there is always something new to learn, especially when collaborating with and learning from my peers. 

<br>

I love hiking <span class="bi bi-person-walking" style="color: #229152;"></span>, teaching, and mentoring students <span class="bi bi-easel-fill" style="color: #101216;"></span>. To unwind, my go-to activities are listening to music <span class="bi bi-music-player-fill" style="color: #101216;"></span>, solving puzzles <span class="bi bi-puzzle-fill" style="color: #212122;"></span>, and catching up with my friends  <span class="bi bi-people-fill" style="color: #101216;"></span>. Recently I have been trying to develop a habit of reading books  <span class="bi bi-book-half" style="color: #242528;"></span>  (Hope this habit sticks <span style="color: black">&#129310;</span>).

<p>&nbsp;</p>


</div>


<div>
</div>

<div>

![](/images/Mano_Photo_About_Me.jpeg){width="70%" height="70%"}

<p>&nbsp;</p>

##### 2024 — Present

Ph.D. Student (Computer Science), <br> 
North Carolina State University, <br>
Raleigh, NC, USA.

##### 2022 — 2024

M.Sc. Mathematics, <br>
Indian Institute of Technology Madras, <br>
Chennai, India.

##### 2019 — 2021

Associate Software Engineer, <br>
OptumInsight India Private Limited, <br>
Chennai, India.

##### 2015 — 2019

B.E. Computer Science and Engineering, <br>
Government College of Technology, Coimbatore, <br>
Coimbatore, India.

</div>

:::
:::
